name: Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato in jacket until fork tender.
2. Peel the potato and mash it in a large bowl.
3. Add powdered sugar 1 cup at a time until a firm dough is formed.
4. Roll between waxed paper to 1/4 inch thick. Remove top layer of waxed paper.
5. Spread peanut butter on potato dough.
6. Roll jelly roll style.
7. Chill until well set.
8. Slice into pretty pinwheel candies.
